top_signal_candidate.question: Will the Fed increase interest rates by 25+ bps after the April 2026 meeting?
top_signal_candidate.rationale: Kevin Warsh (hawkish) at 94.85% to be confirmed as Fed Chair. Tariff-driven inflation in Q1 2026 creates upside pressure on rates. Historical base rate for hike at any given meeting ~5-8% when inflation above target. Market pricing 3.45% may underweight Warsh hawkishness. NOTE: Requires current CPI/PCE data to confirm — Research Agent should verify before flagging for signal.
evidence_required: FOMC dot plot from March 2026 meeting
